use_cases: Displaying project portfolios with animated hover effects
Highlighting featured content in a dark-themed interface
Showcasing product or service highlights with smooth transitions
Presenting media or content collections with premium dark aesthetics
ai_summary: A sleek dark-themed showcase card featuring glassmorphism effects with backdrop blur, subtle gradient borders, and smooth framer-motion animations. The card includes hover-triggered scale, shadow, and border color transitions, along with an animated SVG icon. Designed for displaying featured content, portfolios, or project highlights in premium dark-themed interfaces.
